details.name: SkillSwap Connect
details.overview: A peer-to-peer skill exchange platform where users trade expertise in real-time video sessions.
details.problemSolved: Professional learning is expensive and inaccessible. People have skills others need but no easy way to exchange them.
targetAudience: Students looking to learn practical skills

keyFeatures.title: Skill Matching
keyFeatures.description: AI-powered matching based on what you can teach and what you want to learn.

keyFeatures.title: Live Sessions
keyFeatures.description: Integrated video calls with shared whiteboard and screen sharing.

keyFeatures.title: Credit System
keyFeatures.description: Earn credits by teaching, spend credits to learn — no money involved.

monetization: Premium: $9.99/month for unlimited sessions and priority matching
Enterprise: B2B for company internal knowledge sharing
